entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[DQC.US.0011.6831] It is expected that NetIncomeLoss with a value of 1,989,508 reported in the network role http://njmc.com/role/CondensedConsolidatedStatementsOfOperationsUnaudited should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, ProfitLoss with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:RetainedEarningsMember and a reported value of 2,004,280 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://njmc.com/role/CondensedConsolidatedStatementOfChangesInStockholdersEquityUnaudited. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss fact are:
Period : 2024-07-01 to 2024-09-30 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of NetIncomeLoss : 0 Decimals of ProfitLoss : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - IDR_instance_2024_2025.xml 3395
